mapper.sql: id, job_id, source, status, total_rooms, completed_rooms, success_rooms, failed_rooms, queued_at, started_at, finished_at, message, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM refresh_job WHERE job_id = #{jobId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM refresh_job ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'RUNNING' THEN 0 WHEN 'QUEUED' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END ASC, queued_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM refresh_job WHERE status IN
#{status}
mapper.update: UPDATE refresh_job SET status = 'RUNNING', total_rooms = #{totalRooms}, started_at = #{startedAt}, message = #{message}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE job_id = #{jobId} AND status = 'QUEUED'

UPDATE refresh_job SET completed_rooms = completed_rooms + #{completedIncrement}, success_rooms = success_rooms + #{successIncrement}, failed_rooms = failed_rooms + #{failedIncrement}, message = #{message}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE job_id = #{jobId}
UPDATE refresh_job SET status = #{status}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, message = #{message}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE job_id = #{jobId} AND status = 'RUNNING'
UPDATE refresh_job SET status = #{status}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, message = #{message}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE job_id = #{jobId} AND status IN ('QUEUED', 'RUNNING')
